title: The War Spreads from the Live Floor to the Roof
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Yamato as The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
scene: The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My name is masked Deuce.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The tale I'm about to tell you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is the real story

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: of the man that lived

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Like a raging fire

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Island was Sur- Rounded by unique currents

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That trapped anyone who would dare approach;

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: much like an "antlion of the sea"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Passing sailors were grabbed by its fingers:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on this island located in the eastern sea

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Another victim had washed ashore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe "victim" is too strong of a word...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's no use.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm so hungry that I can't think straight

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No animals inhabit this desolate place, and fish don't approach the shore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought I'd end up writing on a deserted island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is that book:.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "LITTLE GARDEN"!? The island where giants live!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is what the world is like beyond these seas...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: One day, without a doubt, I'll write my own adventure book

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That will shake the world to its core....!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How am I supposed to tell that day- dreaming kid

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: About the harsh reality I face now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So the shore was this way...

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Finally, a good place to set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm?

summary: This section advances the Wano - The War Spreads Across Onigashima storyline with 27 dialogue beats. The Onigashima battle spreads from the Live Floor to the rooftop as Drake changes sides, Queen unleashes Ice Oni, and the Scabbards wound Kaido.
